rationale: Section 11.45 governs procedural timelines for acting on exemption applications and does not reference the dollar amount of the homestead exemption. Increasing the exemption under §11.13(b) requires no change to these procedures.
quote: The chief appraiser shall determine separately each applicant's right to an exemption.
_note: No conflict; §11.45 is purely procedural and silent on exemption dollar amounts.
